_comment: Filters applied to the scorecard AFTER aggregation. Anything in a drop list gets moved to the 'Dropped Clauses' sheet with a reason. Comment/uncomment or edit freely — the filter runs on citation strings ('FAR 52.203-13' etc.) and on category names.

drop_admin_boilerplate.reason: Boilerplate — flows automatically through SAM registration + annual reps & certs; every federal contractor complies by default and it doesn't differentiate suppliers.

drop_regulations._comment: Uncomment / add regulation acronyms here to drop ENTIRE agency-supplement bodies you don't bid on. Example: if you never bid NASA, add 'NFS' to the list.
drop_regulations.reason: Agency supplement excluded — we don't bid this agency.

drop_below_count._comment: Drop clauses that appear in fewer than N contracts. Off by default; enable when you want to trim the long tail.
drop_below_count.reason: Low-frequency — appeared in fewer than the threshold number of contracts.

drop_specific._comment: Manual drop list for one-off exclusions the buckets above don't catch. Add citation strings here.
